welcomeSteps.title: Bookmark this Page!
welcomeSteps.text: Press Ctrl + D (or Cmd + D) to save this page so you can easily return to the portal later.

welcomeSteps.title: Use the Sidebar!
welcomeSteps.text:
The menu lives on the left.

Click the Star Icon at the top to Minimize/Maximize the menu.

The UP arrow puts the sidebar into Mini Mode

accessDeniedTitle: RCRA BI Portal Access Not Verified
accessDeniedMessage:
Your menu is hidden because this Power BI account is not currently recognized as an approved facility user.

Please confirm you are signed into Power BI with your approved facility email address, then refresh this page.

If you believe you should have access, contact your RCRA BI Portal administrator and include the email address shown in your Power BI profile.
